channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [OMEGAIN] Omega Interactive: FY26 Revenue ₹7,098.75 Lakhs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Omega Interactive Technologies Ltd announced audited financial results for the period ended March 31, 2026. The company's revenue from operations stood at ₹7,098.75 lakhs. The Board of Directors approved the audited standalone financial results at their meeting on May 8, 2026, following a review by the Audit Committee. A declaration confirms an unmodified opinion on the audited financial results.

  • Omega Interactive's revenue from operations is ₹7,098.75 lakhs for FY26.
  • The Board approved audited standalone financial results on May 8, 2026.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.
  • The Board Meeting commenced at 5:30 PM and concluded at 6:00 PM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OMEGA INTERACTIVE TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [IISL] Ishaan Infra Board Meeting on May 15, 2026
item.description:
Ishaan Infrastructures and Shelters Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 15, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will also address any other business with the Chair's permission.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 15, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 to be considered.
  • Meeting to be held at the company's registered office.
  • Statutory Auditors' reports to be reviewed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ishaan Infrastructures and Shelters Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JDCABLES] JD Cables: Promoter Shareholding Disclosure for FY26
item.description:
JD Cables Ltd has submitted a declaration under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, confirming that promoters and the promoter group have not created any encumbrance, directly or indirectly, on their shares other than those already disclosed during the financial year ended March 31, 2026.

  • JD Cables complies with SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
  • Promoters declare no new encumbrances on shares for FY26.
  • Disclosure under Regulation 31(4) ensures transparency.
  • Filing confirms existing encumbrances remain unchanged.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JD Cables Ltd | Category: Shareholding

item.title: [RELIABVEN] Reliable Ventures Board Meeting on May 26, 2026
item.description:
Reliable Ventures India Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 26, 2026, at 4:30 P.M. The meeting will consider and approve the standalone financial results of the company for the quarter and 12 months ended March 31, 2026. The Audit Committee will also meet prior to the Board meeting to review the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 26, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve financial results for quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Audit Committee to review financial results prior to the board meeting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIABLE VENTURES INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ACFL] Apex Capital allots 76 Lakh Equity Shares on Warrant Conversion
item.description:
Apex Capital And Finance Ltd has allotted 76,00,000 fully paid-up equity shares of ₹10 each upon conversion of 76,00,000 convertible warrants on May 11, 2026. The Securities Committee approved the allotment after receiving requests from warrant holders and confirmation of payment of the balance 75% of the warrant issue price. Following the conversion, the paid-up equity share capital of the company increased from ₹5,91,99,780 to ₹13,51,99,780. All 76,00,000 warrants stand fully converted, and the newly issued equity shares rank pari-passu with existing shares.

  • Apex Capital allotted 76,00,000 equity shares upon warrant conversion on May 11, 2026.
  • The conversion resulted in ₹71,25,00,000 received towards the exercise price.
  • Post-allotment, the paid-up equity share capital increased to ₹13,51,99,780.
  • All 76,00,000 warrants are now fully converted into equity shares.
  • New equity shares rank equally with existing shares; no change in company control.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Apex Capital And Finance Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [UNIVCABLES] Universal Cables Responds to BSE Clarification on Volume Spurt
item.description:
Universal Cables Ltd. responded to BSE's clarification request regarding the increase in trading volume of its shares on BSE and NSE. The company stated that there is no undisclosed information or event related to the company's operations or performance that would require disclosure under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. Universal Cables also mentioned that it cannot comment on the share price movement due to the free trading of its shares on the stock exchanges.

  • Universal Cables clarifies no undisclosed event impacting trading volume.
  • Company complies with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.
  • Universal Cables cannot comment on share price movements.
  • Response addresses BSE's letter dated 08-05-2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNIVERSAL CABLES LTD. | Category: Clarification

item.title: [AEQUS] Aequs Appoints Ravi Kumar Assudani as Head of Engineering
item.description:
Aequs Limited has announced the appointment of Mr. Ravi Kumar Assudani as Head of Engineering – Consumer Business, effective May 11, 2026. He will also be designated as Senior Management Personnel (SMP) of the company. Mr. Assudani brings over 16 years of experience in manufacturing design and operations, including a senior leadership role at Apple Inc. His expertise includes advanced manufacturing technologies, global supply chain management, and large-scale program execution.

  • Ravi Kumar Assudani appointed Head of Engineering – Consumer Business at Aequs.
  • Appointment effective May 11, 2026; designated as Senior Management Personnel.
  • Assudani brings 16+ years of experience, including leadership at Apple Inc.
  • Expertise includes manufacturing, supply chain, and program execution.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aequs Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [TALBROAUTO] Talbros Automotive Board Meeting on May 20, 2026
item.description:
Talbros Automotive Components Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 20, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending the payment of a final dividend for the financial year 2025-26, subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, the meeting will fix the date of the 69th Annual General Meeting of the Company. The trading window remains closed until May 22, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 20, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of final dividend for FY 2025-26 is on the agenda.
  • Date fixation for the 69th Annual General Meeting will be discussed.
  • Trading window remains closed until May 22, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TALBROS AUTOMOTIVE COMPONENTS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SHALBY] Shalby Ltd Board Meeting on May 27, 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Shalby Ltd has announced that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled for May 27, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a dividend on the equity shares for the financial year 2025-26, subject to member approval. The trading window for the company's equity shares has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the financial results are made public.

  • Shalby Ltd's board will meet on May 27, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • The board will consider recommending a dividend for FY 2025-26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post results announcement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Shalby Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AHASOLAR] Ahasolar Tech Bags ₹1 Cr Consultancy Work Order
item.description:
Ahasolar Technologies Ltd has received a work order for consultancy services for Project Management Consultancy (PMC) for DC Capacity Upgradation of 5 MW Ramgarh, Jaisalmer Solar Plant from a domestic entity. The consultancy service is valued at approximately ₹1 Crore (including GST) and is expected to be executed over 15 months. The name of the entity awarding the order is not disclosed due to confidentiality obligations.

  • Ahasolar Technologies secures a consultancy work order worth ₹1 Crore.
  • The project involves PMC for DC Capacity Upgradation of a 5 MW solar plant.
  • The order is from a domestic entity, with execution planned over 15 months.
  • Client's name is withheld due to confidentiality agreements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ahasolar Technologies Ltd | Category: Business Update
